# SettleWire

> Prediction markets news, contextualized. We cluster coverage of each event
> from 90+ outlets, credit the first reporter, and add original analysis of
> why it matters for traders, operators, and regulation watchers. All article
> text is our own original writing; every story links to its primary source.

## Sections
- [Front page](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/index.html)
- [Story archive](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/all.html): every story, searchable
- [The Docket](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/events.html): upcoming court dates, earnings, deadlines
- [RSS feed](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/rss.xml)

## Latest stories
- [South Korea grants Polymarket hearing on illegal gambling charges](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/south-korea-grants-polymarket-hearing-on-illegal-gambling-charges.html): South Korean authorities have given Polymarket an opportunity to formally respond to allegations that its platform constitutes illegal gambling under local law, according to SBC News.
- [Traders Sue Polymarket Over Strategy Bitcoin Sale Market Dispute](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/traders-sue-polymarket-over-strategy-bitcoin-sale-market-dispute.html): William Wood and Thomas Bush filed suit against Polymarket in New York Supreme Court on July 3, alleging breach of contract after the platform resolved a Strategy bitcoin-sale prediction market as 'No' despite an SEC filing showing Strategy sold 32 BTC between May 26 and May 31.
- [Polymarket $50 Sign-Up Bonus Rolls Out via Sports Media Referral Codes](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/polymarket-50-sign-up-bonus-rolls-out-via-sports-media-referral-codes.html): Polymarket is offering a $50 bonus to new users who deposit at least $20 in July 2026 through referral codes distributed by sports media partners including CBS Sports, Elite Sports NY, and RotoWire.
- [Kalshi LeBron James next-team market draws significant trader attention](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/kalshi-lebron-james-next-team-market-draws-significant-trader-attention.html): A prediction market on Kalshi tracking where LeBron James will sign next has seen a notable shift in contract prices, reflecting updated trader sentiment about the NBA star's future.
- [North Carolina Budget Would Legalize Prediction Market Betting](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/north-carolina-budget-would-legalize-prediction-market-betting.html): North Carolina's newly proposed state budget includes language that would authorize prediction market betting within the state, marking a significant step toward regulated event-contract wagering at the state level.
- [Maryland regulators sent casino-drafted letter attacking prediction markets to feds](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/maryland-regulators-sent-casino-drafted-letter-attacking-prediction-markets-to-f.html): Maryland officials submitted a letter to federal regulators opposing prediction markets that was written nearly verbatim by casino industry lobbyists, according to Reason Magazine.
- [Kalshi's media influence scrutinized in Popular Information exposé](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/kalshi-s-media-influence-scrutinized-in-popular-information-expos.html): Popular Information's Judd Legum published a critical investigation into how Kalshi, the CFTC-regulated prediction market, is shaping news coverage of its own contracts and broader political events.
- [South Korea regulator to hear Polymarket defense before gambling ruling](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/south-korea-regulator-to-hear-polymarket-defense-before-gambling-ruling.html): South Korea's Broadcasting, Media and Communications Review Committee announced on Monday, July 6, 2026, it would let Polymarket submit a formal defense before deciding whether to issue a corrective order over illegal gambling concerns.
- [Polymarket Iran Deal Market Sparks Trader Revolt Over Resolution](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/polymarket-iran-deal-market-sparks-trader-revolt-over-resolution.html): Polymarket traders are disputing the platform's resolution of a prediction market tied to an Iran nuclear deal, with participants arguing the outcome was called incorrectly and fighting to reverse the decision.
- [Polymarket Trader Bleeds $11M on World Cup 2026 Contracts](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/31e6d2e673b5.html): A single Polymarket trader lost more than $11 million wagering on 2026 FIFA World Cup outcome markets over just ten days.
